meta.name: Osmane Kalache
meta.title: Software Engineer / Technical Leadership
meta.bio: 15+ years shipping real software across IoT, telecom, real estate, and fintech. Founder of ioprodz — independent software engineering consultancy for AI products.

experience.title: Chief Technology Officer (Contract)
experience.briefLine: Contract CTO: technology strategy, architecture decisions, and structuring the product team during the startup phase.
experience.objective: Supporting leadership as a contract CTO: technology strategy, architecture decisions, engineering practices, and structuring the product team.

experience.title: Founder & Software Engineering Consultant
experience.project: Independent software engineering consultancy — Europe / North Africa
experience.briefLine: Founder of ioprodz: taking AI teams from vibe coding to real product in 90 days, on sovereign AI infrastructure.
experience.objective: Help teams building AI products move from "vibe coding" to real product in ~90 days: install the engineering that makes daily releases safe (evals, rollback, observability, domain modeling), on a sovereign, model-agnostic AI infrastructure (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Grok, or self-hosted open-weight models).
actions: Engineering audits of AI products: evals, guardrails, rollback, observability, cost control
Installation of a sovereign AI stack — provider/model swappable per feature, no vendor lock-in
Reinstating TDD / DDD / XP practices applied to AI features (not abandoned because of them)
Rebuilding the CI/CD pipeline to reach a cadence of multiple releases per day
Activating AI inside the "internal factory" (documentation, refactors, test generation, metrics analysis, code review) to give the team time back

techEnv.value: Multi-cloud (AWS, GCP, Azure) + self-hosted (Coolify, Railway, Vercel)
Go, TypeScript / Node.js, NestJS, React / Next.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB
OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Grok, open-weight models; evals, LLM observability

experience.title: Senior Lead Backend Engineer
experience.teamSize: (20+): 2 squads (Engineering Manager + PM + Designer + 3-4 fullstack devs)
experience.briefLine: Lead backend on a B2B automotive SaaS: qualified stock sourcing and credit-line financing for used-car dealers.
experience.objective: Developing a system enabling used-vehicle dealers to source qualified stock from B2B platforms and obtain financing (credit line) while managing default risk and high-risk vehicles.
actions: Transitioning the development process toward an AI-first approach (experimentation, tool selection, prompt engineering)
Interfacing with non-technical stakeholders and balancing value delivery with code maintenance
Designing and developing new features in small releasable iterations (functional specs → technical specs → coding → code review → testing → deployment → monitoring)
Improving team performance through feedback loops and pragmatic experimentation (DORA, mentoring, workflows, automation...)
Maintaining a technical roadmap (managing tech debt, improving architecture / DX...)

techEnv.value: NestJS, PostgreSQL, REST, EventBus, Docker, React

freelanceProjects.title: Viewer-engagement visualization for movie reviews
freelanceProjects.objective: The "/comment" site publishes reviews of new movies. As added value, the site's author Rich Heimlich proposes a novel way to express viewer engagement (Appeal) without spoiling scenes for the reader. I integrated a data-visualization tool driven from an admin interface, rendering charts on the various articles published on the site.
freelanceProjects.techEnv: PHP, MySQL, Chart.js, JavaScript (jQuery), CSS, social media sharing (Pinterest)

freelanceProjects.title: Mobile app: civil aviation equipment inventory
freelanceProjects.objective: Novus Technologies, a subsidiary of Novus Aviation Capital, provides innovative solutions for civil aviation. NVSscan is a solution for inventorying safety equipment on aircraft. I worked with their team to build a mobile app that communicates with an NFC reader device and returns the scanned equipment IDs, flagging missing items or anomalies.
freelanceProjects.techEnv: React Native (JavaScript), Native Modules (Java), Bluetooth, NFC, GitLab

freelanceProjects.title: Online signing and generation of training contracts
freelanceProjects.objective: To simplify a procedure that required multiple email exchanges and a paper contract filled by hand and scanned back to the training organization, I was asked to build a tool allowing platform users to view their contract and sign it using a mouse or graphics tablet. A PDF copy is then emailed to the signer.
freelanceProjects.techEnv: PHP, TCPDF, MySQL, SVG, JavaScript (jQuery), CSS

freelanceProjects.title: E-commerce site: Yatas Bedding
freelanceProjects.objective: Build an e-commerce site for a major supplier of bedding, home articles, and décor, integrating PayU — Turkey's largest payment gateway.
freelanceProjects.techEnv: PHP (CodeIgniter/OpenCart), MySQL, HTML, CSS, jQuery, PayU API, Git

freelanceProjects.title: Back-pay calculation software for local communal-guard officers
freelanceProjects.client: Delegation of the Communal Guard of Médéa (Algeria)
freelanceProjects.objective: Build software using the existing employee database (5,000+ records) of the Wilaya of Médéa's Communal Guard to compute salary back-pay based on each officer's years of experience. The software prints, in multiple formats, the documents and slips sent to the treasury and archives.
freelanceProjects.techEnv: Windows Forms Applications (C# .NET), Crystal Reports, MS Access
